All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BuildGraph
Utility class responsible for constructing a graph from a list of cities and their transport data.
City
Represents a city within the transportation network.
Criteria
Enum representing different optimization criteria for route finding in the transport network.
Departure
Represents a departure (bus or train) from one station to another.
DimensionInputDialog
A dialog window that allows the user to input the dimensions of the map.
Graph
Represents a graph structure used for modeling transport routes between cities or stations.
GraphEdge
Represents a directed edge in the transport graph.
GraphNode
Represents a node in the transport graph.
GraphVisualizer
The class is responsible for rendering a visual representation of a transport graph, including cities as nodes and departures as edges, using JavaFX's GraphicsContext.
Main
Main entry point of the Transport Application.
Path
Represents a path in the transport graph, consisting of a sequence of nodes, a total cost, and a list of departures used along the way.
RouteFinder
A utility class for finding optimal routes in a transport graph based on various criteria such as lowest price, shortest travel time, or fewest transfers.
RouteSelectionScreen
Screen for selecting routes between cities with optimization criteria.
Station
Represents a station in a city, which includes both a bus and a train station.
TransportData
Represents the transport data for a country including its map, stations, and departures.
TransportDataGenerator
A class responsible for generating transport data including the map of cities, transport stations, and departures.
